# Wind Energy

Wind energy is among the fastest-growing renewables. Onshore wind costs are below fossil fuels. Offshore wind is led by [[vestas]] and [[siemens-gamesa]]. [[iea-world-energy-outlook-2024]] projects significant capacity growth. Compare with [[photovoltaic-cell]] in [[solar-vs-wind]]. Wind forecasting can use [[lstm-network]] time series models.
